name: WORLD_END
tooltip: Handling of game world when last character dies.

name: CITY_SIZE
tooltip: A number determining how large cities are.  0 disables cities, roads and any scenario requiring a city start.

name: CITY_SPACING
tooltip: A number determining how far apart cities are.  Warning, small numbers lead to very slow mapgen.

name: SPECIALS_DENSITY
tooltip: A scaling factor that determines density of overmap specials.

name: SPECIALS_SPACING
tooltip: A number determing minimum distance between overmap specials.  -1 allows intersections of specials.

name: VEHICLE_DAMAGE
tooltip: A scaling factor that determines how damaged vehicles are.

name: VEHICLE_LOCKS
tooltip: Determines if new vehicles can spawn with locked doors.

name: VEHICLE_SPAWNRATE
tooltip: A scaling factor that determines density of vehicle spawns.

name: VEHICLE_GUN_RECOIL_FACTOR
tooltip: A scaling factor that determines how strongly firing guns pushes the vehicle you are on.  0.0 disables this behavior, 1.0 uses the default mass-based recoil propulsion, and higher values exaggerate it.

name: SPAWN_DENSITY
tooltip: A scaling factor that determines density of monster spawns.

name: SPAWN_ANIMAL_DENSITY
tooltip: A scaling factor that determines density of animal spawns.

name: CARRION_SPAWNRATE
tooltip: A scaling factor that determines how often creatures spawn from rotting material.

name: NPC_DENSITY
tooltip: A scaling factor that determines density of dynamic NPC spawns.

name: MONSTER_UPGRADE_FACTOR
tooltip: A scaling factor that determines the time between monster upgrades.  A higher number means slower evolution.  Set to 0.00 to turn off monster upgrades.

name: RESTOCK_DELAY_MULT
tooltip: A scaling factor that determines restock rate of merchants.

name: CROSS_Z_LEVEL_MELEE_DIFFICULTY_MODIFIER
tooltip: A scaling factor that determines additional move and stamina cost for melee attacks against a target above or below you.  1.00 disables the modifier.

title: Enabled Skill Buffs
desc: Enable or disable major skill buffs

name: cooking_kcal_buff
tooltip: Include the scaling calories from cooking buff?

name: althletics_encumbrance_buff
tooltip: Include the reduce all encumbrance per level of althletics buff?

name: canmutprofmut
tooltip: Allow starting traits to be cancelled and effected by purifiers?

name: ITEM_SPAWNRATE
tooltip: A scaling factor that determines density of item spawns. A higher number means more items. Affects both map generation and monster death drops.

name: MONSTER_SPEED
tooltip: Determines the movement rate of monsters.  A higher value increases monster speed and a lower reduces it.  Requires world reset.

name: MONSTER_RESILIENCE
tooltip: Determines how much damage monsters can take.  A higher value makes monsters more resilient and a lower makes them more flimsy.  Requires world reset.

name: INITIAL_TIME
tooltip: Initial starting time of day on character generation.

name: INITIAL_DAY
tooltip: How many days into the year the cataclysm occurred.  Day 0 is Spring 1.  Day -1 randomizes the start date.  Can be overridden by scenarios.  This does not advance food rot or monster evolution.

name: SPAWN_DELAY
tooltip: How many days after the cataclysm the player spawns.  Day 0 is the day of the cataclysm.  Can be overridden by scenarios.  Increasing this will cause food rot and monster evolution to advance.

name: SEASON_LENGTH
tooltip: Season length, in days.

name: CONSTRUCTION_SCALING
tooltip: Sets the time of construction in percents.  '50' is two times faster than default, '200' is two times longer.  '0' makes construction instant.

name: CRAFTING_SPEED_MULT
tooltip: Sets default crafting speed in percents.  '50' is two times faster than default, '200' is two times longer.  '0' makes crafting instant.

name: GROWTH_SCALING
tooltip: Sets the time of crop growth in percents.  '50' is two times faster than default, '200' is two times longer.  '0' automatically scales growth time to match the world's season length.

name: ETERNAL_SEASON
tooltip: Keep the initial season for ever.

name: WANDER_SPAWNS
tooltip: Emulation of zombie hordes.  Zombie spawn points wander around cities and may go to noise.  Must reset world directory after changing for it to take effect.

name: BLACK_ROAD
tooltip: If true, spawn zombies at shelters.  Makes the starting game a lot harder.

name: STATIC_NPC
tooltip: If true, static NPCs will spawn at pre-defined locations.  Requires world reset.

name: STARTING_NPC
tooltip: Determines whether starting NPCs should spawn, and if they do, how exactly.

name: RANDOM_NPC
tooltip: If true, the game will randomly spawn NPCs during gameplay.

name: RAD_MUTATION
tooltip: If true, radiation causes the player to mutate.

name: POCKET_SIMULATION_LEVEL
tooltip: How to handle the last visited pocket dimension. 'Off' unloads normally. 'None' keeps loaded but frozen for fast travel. 'Minimal' simulates fields only (fire, gas). 'Moderate' adds vehicle systems (solar charging). 'Full' simulates everything including off-screen combat.

name: CHARACTER_POINT_POOLS
tooltip: Allowed point pools for character generation.

name: ENFORCE_PROFESSION_AGE_RANGE
tooltip: When enabled, character ages are constrained by profession-defined age ranges when available.

name: DISABLE_LIFTING
menu_text: Disables lifting requirements for vehicle parts.
tooltip: If true, strength checks and/or lifting qualities no longer need to be met in order to change parts.
